name: Peanut Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large pan over medium heat.
2. Add onions and celery; sauté until soft.
3. Stir in flour, cooking for 1 minute to coat the vegetables.
4. Gradually add chicken stock and peanut butter, stirring to combine.
5. Simmer the mixture for 20 minutes.
6. Let it cool for 15 minutes, then puree in batches using a blender.
(The soup can be prepared up to this point and refrigerated until ready to serve.)
7. To serve, reheat the soup gently in a saucepan over medium heat.
8. Adjust seasoning with salt and lemon juice as needed.
9. Serve hot, adding cream and a sprinkle of chopped peanuts on top.
